attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT 
NSOT.SALES_ORDER_KEY SALES_ORDER_KEY, 
CASE WHEN SUCSEC.SHIP_TO_SITE_USE_ID =-999 
THEN COALESCE(NCAT_SOLD.CUSTOMER_ACCOUNT_KEY,-999)
ELSE 
COALESCE(NECAL_SHIP.ERP_CUST_ACCOUNT_LOCATION_KEY,-999) 
END END_CUSTOMER_KEY,
CASE WHEN SUCSEC.SHIP_TO_SITE_USE_ID =-999 
THEN 'ACCOUNT' 
ELSE 'ACCOUNT_LOCATION' END END_CUSTOMER_TYPE_CODE,
NSOT.SK_SALES_ORDER_HEADER_ID_INT,
NSOT.SS_CODE,
SUCSEC.CREATE_DATETIME EDW_CREATE_DATETIME
FROM 
$$STGDB.ST_UO_CCA_SO_END_CUSTOMERS SUCSEC
INNER JOIN (
$$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_TV NSOT
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC_SOL
ON( NSSC_SOL.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE= NSOT.SS_CODE)
)
ON ( SUCSEC.HEADER_ID=NSOT.SK_SALES_ORDER_HEADER_ID_INT AND NSSC_SOL.GLOBAL_NAME='UO' )
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_ERP_CUST_ACCT_LOC_USE NECAL_SHIP
ON ( SUCSEC.SHIP_TO_SITE_USE_ID=NECAL_SHIP.SK_SITE_USE_ID_INT ) 
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_CUSTOMER_ACCOUNT NCAT_SOLD
ON( SUCSEC.END_CUSTOMER_ID=NCAT_SOLD.SK_CUSTOMER_ACCOUNT_ID_INT ) 
WHERE SUCSEC.LINE_ID IS NULL 
QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY SUCSEC.HEADER_ID ORDER BY SUCSEC.CDB_DEQUEUE_TIME DESC) = 1

SELECT 
NSOT.SALES_ORDER_KEY SALES_ORDER_KEY, 
CASE WHEN SBCSEC.SHIP_TO_SITE_USE_ID =-999 
THEN COALESCE(NCAT_SOLD.CUSTOMER_ACCOUNT_KEY,-999)
ELSE 
COALESCE(NECAL_SHIP.ERP_CUST_ACCOUNT_LOCATION_KEY,-999) 
END END_CUSTOMER_KEY,
CASE WHEN SBCSEC.SHIP_TO_SITE_USE_ID =-999 
THEN 'ACCOUNT' 
ELSE 'ACCOUNT_LOCATION' END END_CUSTOMER_TYPE_CODE,
NSOT.SK_SALES_ORDER_HEADER_ID_INT,
NSOT.SS_CODE SS_CODE,
SBCSEC.CREATE_DATETIME EDW_CREATE_DATETIME
FROM 
$$STGDB.ST_BO_CCA_SO_END_CUSTOMERS SBCSEC
INNER JOIN (
$$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_TV NSOT
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC_SOL
ON( NSSC_SOL.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE= NSOT.SS_CODE)
)
ON ( SBCSEC.HEADER_ID=NSOT.SK_SALES_ORDER_HEADER_ID_INT AND NSSC_SOL.GLOBAL_NAME='BO' )
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_ERP_CUST_ACCT_LOC_USE NECAL_SHIP
ON ( SBCSEC.SHIP_TO_SITE_USE_ID=NECAL_SHIP.SK_SITE_USE_ID_INT ) 
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_CUSTOMER_ACCOUNT NCAT_SOLD
ON( SBCSEC.END_CUSTOMER_ID=NCAT_SOLD.SK_CUSTOMER_ACCOUNT_ID_INT ) 
WHERE SBCSEC.LINE_ID IS NULL 
QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY SBCSEC.HEADER_ID ORDER BY SBCSEC.CDB_DEQUEUE_TIME DESC) = 1

SELECT 
SBCSEC.GES_PK_ID, 
SBCSEC.PHONE_ID,
SBCSEC.POSTAL_CODE,
SBCSEC.SALESREP_ID, 
SBCSEC.SHIP_TO_SITE_USE_ID, 
SBCSEC.SPLIT_PERCENTAGE, 
SBCSEC.CONTACT_ID,
SBCSEC.COUNTRY, 
SBCSEC.DATA_SOURCE, 
SBCSEC.END_CUSTOMER_ID,
SBCSEC.END_CUSTOMER_VERSION, 
SBCSEC.HEADER_ID, 
SBCSEC.LINE_ID, 
SBCSEC.MARKET_SEGMENT, 
SBCSEC.CDB_DATA_SOURCE, 
SBCSEC.CDB_ENQUEUE_TIME,
SBCSEC.CDB_DEQUEUE_TIME, 
SBCSEC.CDB_ENQUEUE_SEQ, 
SBCSEC.BATCH_ID, 
SBCSEC.QUEUE_ID, 
SBCSEC.PROCESS_SET_ID,
SBCSEC.Q_CREATION_DATE, 
SBCSEC.Q_UPDATE_DATE,
SBCSEC.ACTION_CODE,
SBCSEC.CREATE_DATETIME,
'RI' EXCEPTION_TYPE 
FROM  
	$$STGDB.ST_BO_CCA_SO_END_CUSTOMERS SBCSEC
	WHERE 
	(NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$ETLVWDB.SM_SALES_ORDER SSO
				INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC_SOL
				ON( NSSC_SOL.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE= SSO.SS_CODE)
				WHERE COALESCE(SBCSEC.HEADER_ID,-9999)=SSO.SK_SALES_ORDER_HEADER_ID_INT AND NSSC_SOL.GLOBAL_NAME='BO' )
	OR 
	NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM $$COMREFVWDB.N_ERP_CUST_ACCT_LOC_USE NECAL_SHIP
				WHERE SBCSEC.SHIP_TO_SITE_USE_ID=NECAL_SHIP.SK_SITE_USE_ID_INT )
	OR 
	NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM $$COMREFVWDB.N_CUSTOMER_ACCOUNT  NCAT_SOLD
				WHERE SBCSEC.END_CUSTOMER_ID=NCAT_SOLD.SK_CUSTOMER_ACCOUNT_ID_INT  ) )
	AND LINE_ID IS NULL 
QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY SBCSEC.HEADER_ID ORDER BY SBCSEC.CREATE_DATETIME DESC) = 1

SELECT 
ECOHEC.HEADER_ID,
ECOHEC.END_CUSTOMER_SITE_USE_ID,
ECOHEC.END_CUSTOMER_ID,
ECOHEC.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME,
ECOHEC.GLOBAL_NAME
FROM 
$$EXCEPDB.EX_CG1_OE_HEADERS_END_CUST ECOHEC 
WHERE 
ECOHEC.EXCEPTION_TYPE = 'RI'
AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1
FROM $$STGDB.ST_CG1_OE_HEADERS_END_CUST SCOHEC
WHERE 
SCOHEC.HEADER_ID = ECOHEC.HEADER_ID)

SELECT 
NSOT.SALES_ORDER_KEY SALES_ORDER_KEY, 
CASE WHEN SCOHEC.END_CUSTOMER_SITE_USE_ID =-999 
THEN COALESCE(NCAT_SOLD.CUSTOMER_ACCOUNT_KEY,-999)
ELSE 
COALESCE(NECAL_SHIP.ERP_CUST_ACCOUNT_LOCATION_KEY,-999) 
END END_CUSTOMER_KEY,
CASE WHEN SCOHEC.END_CUSTOMER_SITE_USE_ID =-999 
THEN 'ACCOUNT' 
ELSE 'ACCOUNT_LOCATION' END END_CUSTOMER_TYPE_CODE,
NSOT.SK_SALES_ORDER_HEADER_ID_INT,
NSOT.SS_CODE SS_CODE,
SCOHEC.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME EDW_CREATE_DATETIME
FROM 
$$STGDB.ST_CG1_OE_HEADERS_END_CUST SCOHEC
INNER JOIN (
$$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_TV NSOT
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC_SOL
ON( NSSC_SOL.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE= NSOT.SS_CODE)
)
ON ( SCOHEC.HEADER_ID=NSOT.SK_SALES_ORDER_HEADER_ID_INT AND NSSC_SOL.GLOBAL_NAME='CG' )
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_ERP_CUST_ACCT_LOC_USE NECAL_SHIP
ON ( SCOHEC.END_CUSTOMER_SITE_USE_ID=NECAL_SHIP.SK_SITE_USE_ID_INT ) 
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_CUSTOMER_ACCOUNT NCAT_SOLD
ON( SCOHEC.END_CUSTOMER_ID=NCAT_SOLD.SK_CUSTOMER_ACCOUNT_ID_INT ) 
-----WHERE SCOHEC.LINE_ID IS NULL 
QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY SCOHEC.HEADER_ID ORDER BY SCOHEC.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME DESC) = 1

SELECT 
SCOHEC.HEADER_ID,
SCOHEC.END_CUSTOMER_SITE_USE_ID,
SCOHEC.END_CUSTOMER_ID,
SCOHEC.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME,
SCOHEC.GLOBAL_NAME,
'RI' EXCEPTION_TYPE 
FROM  
                $$STGDB.ST_CG1_OE_HEADERS_END_CUST SCOHEC
                WHERE 
                (NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$ETLVWDB.SM_SALES_ORDER SSO
                                                                INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC_SOL
                                                                ON( NSSC_SOL.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE= SSO.SS_CODE)
                                                                WHERE COALESCE(SCOHEC.HEADER_ID,-9999)=SSO.SK_SALES_ORDER_HEADER_ID_INT AND NSSC_SOL.GLOBAL_NAME='CG' )
                OR 
                NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM $$COMREFVWDB.N_ERP_CUST_ACCT_LOC_USE NECAL_SHIP
                                                                WHERE SCOHEC.END_CUSTOMER_SITE_USE_ID=NECAL_SHIP.SK_SITE_USE_ID_INT )
                OR 
                NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM $$COMREFVWDB.N_CUSTOMER_ACCOUNT  NCAT_SOLD
                                                                WHERE SCOHEC.END_CUSTOMER_ID=NCAT_SOLD.SK_CUSTOMER_ACCOUNT_ID_INT  ) )
----         AND LINE_ID IS NULL 
QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY SCOHEC.HEADER_ID ORDER BY SCOHEC.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME DESC) = 1

SELECT 
EUCSEC.GES_PK_ID, 
EUCSEC.PHONE_ID, 
EUCSEC.POSTAL_CODE,
EUCSEC.SALESREP_ID, 
EUCSEC.SHIP_TO_SITE_USE_ID, 
EUCSEC.SPLIT_PERCENTAGE,
EUCSEC.CONTACT_ID, 
EUCSEC.COUNTRY, 
EUCSEC.DATA_SOURCE,
EUCSEC.END_CUSTOMER_ID, 
EUCSEC.END_CUSTOMER_VERSION, 
EUCSEC.HEADER_ID,
EUCSEC.LINE_ID, 
EUCSEC.MARKET_SEGMENT, 
EUCSEC.CDB_DATA_SOURCE,
EUCSEC.CDB_ENQUEUE_TIME, 
EUCSEC.CDB_DEQUEUE_TIME,
EUCSEC.CDB_ENQUEUE_SEQ, 
EUCSEC.BATCH_ID, 
EUCSEC.QUEUE_ID,
EUCSEC.PROCESS_SET_ID, 
EUCSEC.Q_CREATION_DATE, 
EUCSEC.Q_UPDATE_DATE,
EUCSEC.ACTION_CODE, 
EUCSEC.CREATE_DATETIME
FROM 
$$EXCEPDB.EX_UO_CCA_SO_END_CSMRS_HDR EUCSEC
WHERE EUCSEC.EXCEPTION_TYPE = 'RI'
   AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1
                      FROM $$STGDB.ST_UO_CCA_SO_END_CUSTOMERS SUCSEC
                     WHERE SBCSEC.GES_PK_ID = EUCSEC.GES_PK_ID)
